privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task operates on synthetic test data: a WooCommerce environment with 8 pre-seeded products (SKUs: WBH-001, YMP-001, RBS-005, PCH-DUO, OCT-BLK-M, BCB-SET2, LED-DL-01, CPP-SET3) created via wp-cli. All category names (Outdoor & Recreation, Camping Gear, Fitness Equipment), tag names (bestseller, eco-friendly, gift-idea), product SKU assignments, featured product list, and the exact short description text for PCH-DUO ('Ultralight double hammock perfect for backpacking and outdoor adventures. Supports up to 500 lbs.') match the task specification and are internally consistent across task.json, task description, README.md, and setup_woocommerce.sh. No discrepancies found.
